## Configuration Change History

### Stage 0 - Initialization

**No configuration changes in Stage 0.**

The architecture has been designed to require configuration management approval for:
- Database credentials (KMS/Vault)
- API endpoint configuration
- Service mesh settings
- Authentication provider setup
- Deployment environment configs

These will be processed through this log during Stage 2 (Backend Implementation) and beyond.
